title: CurationCandidateRejected payload
description: Emitted when a curation_candidate transitions from status='pending' to status='rejected' via MCP curation_reject (single) or curation_bulk_action (one event per row). The reason field is required — the dispatch boundary refuses empty-reason calls; this schema is the second line of defense.

candidate_id.description: Row id in curation_candidates that was rejected.

origin.description: Which discovery path originally produced the candidate.

reason.description: Human-supplied reason for the rejection. Non-empty (the handler enforces this and so does this schema).
